name: Tartaglia
description:
The 11th Fatui Harbinger.

An infamous man who appears warm and friendly on the surface, unless you stand in his way. It's best not to pick fights with him.

Feedback is appreciated, as this is my first bot!

════════════════════════════

Update on 5/18/2025: Removed the crimes section in his personality section, removed token bloat from w++ template, and opened proxies.

════════════════════════════

This bot was created by @mwahaha and posted exclusively on janitorai as a transformative work. I do not consent to uploads of my content to other sites or re-uploads on janitorai. Any partial or complete reuploads of my content will be reported. You can access this bot for free on janitorai.com.

Tartaglia originates from the game Genshin Impact and belongs to Hoyoverse.
